chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-641 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2914/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.2915/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.2916/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 08-5-2025 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Maher, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent Application is granted. 2 to 5. The petitioner being civil servant has approached this Court though remedy is available to him under the law to approach before the Service tribunal. This petition being barred by Article 212 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, is hereby dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
